ordinanceLabel: 2025 CBSC statewide — no local amendment ordinance
permitModelNote: Buellton contracts all building permit review and inspection to SB County Building and Safety. Most projects require a two-step process: (1) zoning clearance from Buellton Planning, then (2) building permit via SB County Accela portal.
suggestedQuestions: Do I need a city zoning clearance before applying for a building permit in Buellton?
What permits can I pull directly through SB County without a city clearance?
Does my property fall in a fire hazard severity zone (FHSZ)?
What are Buellton's ADU setback and height requirements?
Which zoning district is my parcel in — RS, RM, CN, or Village Specific Plan?
How do I submit plans to Santa Barbara County Building and Safety?
